title: All about Aki - How To Use Akiflow
text: # All about Aki * What can Aki do? * 💌 Send Aki an email to create tasks (Beta) ## What can Aki do? Create tasks with Aki is quick and easy. Aki can see your **tasks, time slots and events** and **move tasks and time slots** for you. Aki can also help move tasks in and out of time slots. You can now **delete via Aki, tasks created by Aki only**. ### **💌 Send Aki an email to create tasks (Beta)** Aki can now **create tasks and events directly from your email.** ✏️ You can **add all the emails that can text your unique Aki** email address (your personal email, your colleagues, your partner) to **let them create tasks into your Akiflow.**
